sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move UP to destroy top green piece
action(['UP', 'UP'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}, Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
green_count = 0
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 50:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"White: rows [{min(rows)}, {max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}, {max(cols)}]")
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        green_count += 1
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green: rows [{min(rows)}, {max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}, {max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

print(f"Green pieces remaining: {green_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
